subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, O assured leaf! In this mighty century and wondrous age—the Dispensation of the Ancient Beauty, may my spirit be sacrificed for Him— [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ای ورقه موقنه در این قرن عظیم و عصر بدیع و کور جمال قدم روحی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
